title: AUUUUGH Sculk Shrieker
description: Sculk Shriekers no longer shriek, they... AUUUUGH when triggered. Yeah.
body:
If you're familiar with memes, you likely know the sound without even hearing it. Applying this pack changes the sculk shrieker to do a fake snoring meme whenever you set it off.

You either love or hate the sound, there's no in-between.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SiRJUrVyIFc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
